settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage your application settings here. Select a category from the sidebar to get started.

general.title: General Settings
general.subtitle: Manage basic application settings and behavior
general.themeDesc: Choose the appearance theme of the app
general.languageDesc: Choose the display language of the app
general.autoStartDesc: Automatically open the app when the system starts
general.minimizeToTrayDesc: Hide to system tray when clicking minimize
general.closeToTrayDesc: Hide to tray instead of quitting when clicking close
general.context7ApiKeyDesc: API key for Context7 service access, stored locally only.
general.showNotificationsDesc: Receive system messages and tip notifications
general.clearCacheDesc: Clear app cache to free disk space
general.resetAppDesc: Restore all settings to default. This action cannot be undone

provider.title: AI Provider Configuration
provider.description: Configure and manage your AI model providers
provider.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this provider? This action cannot be undone.
provider.apiTypeDescription: Select the API format used by this provider. This ensures correct API calls.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: View all loaded Skills with their tool capabilities and permission configurations.

install.title: Install Skills from GitHub
install.description: Supports repository URL (e.g. https://github.com/antfu/skills) or owner/repo (e.g. antfu/skills). Also supports scanning skill description files from other products (e.g. SKILL.md / AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md), and automatically reads compatible skills from local directories (e.g. ~/.claude/skills). View skill details below.
install.errorNoRepo: Please enter a GitHub repository address first

update.title: Application Update
update.description: Check and get the latest version of the app
update.upToDate: You are already on the latest version.
update.loadError: Failed to load release notes. Please check your network connection.

toast.upToDate: You are already on the latest version!
toast.downloadComplete: Update downloaded successfully. You can install it now.

devTools.title: Developer Tools
devTools.description: Open developer tools for debugging and inspecting the app

mcp.title: MCP Configuration
mcp.description: Configure MCP servers using Cursor-compatible JSON format.
mcp.hint: Use Cursor format: { "mcpServers": { "name": { "command": "...", "args": [] } } }. Use "url" for HTTP transport; add "disabled": true to disable a server.

skillsPage.title: Skills
skillsPage.description: Manage installed skills and the skill store in one place.

context.title: Skills Context Strategy
context.description: Control how the AI perceives skills in chat.
context.eagerDesc: AI can directly see full details of all skills
context.eagerTip: AI sees full skill prompts at chat start and can use them directly
context.lazyDesc: AI sees summaries first and loads details when needed
context.lazyTip: AI only sees skill names and descriptions first, saving tokens
context.toastUpdated: Skills context strategy updated and will take effect in the next conversation

store.title: Skill Store
store.description: Browse and install skills you need. This is currently a simple store sample page.

writing.name: Writing Assistant
writing.desc: Improve copywriting, expand drafts, and polish tone for everyday writing.

data.name: Data Analyst
data.desc: Quickly generate analysis ideas, summarize conclusions, and suggest actions.

frontend.name: Frontend Helper
frontend.desc: Assist with component development, styling, and page structure optimization.

agents.title: Agent
agents.description: Create and tune your custom agents.

form.title: Create Agent
form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What this agent is for, and how it should help.
form.promptPlaceholder: Define the role, constraints, response style, and execution rules.
form.mapHint: Use JSON for capability tuning weights, for example planning/reasoning/toolUse.
form.dialogDescription: Configure name, prompt, skills and MAP tuning for this agent.

list.title: Created Agents
list.emptyCustom: No custom agents yet. Click "Create Agent" to add one.

preview.title: Message Preview
preview.noMessages: No message content available for preview.
